---
name: twn-session-handoff
description: Preserve sufficient verified context for another AI to continue TWN without rereading the full blueprint.
---

# TWN Session Handoff

Record:
- current phase, feature, and task;
- relevant blueprint and requirement IDs;
- files inspected and changed;
- commands and exact results;
- decisions and rejected alternatives;
- bugs, risks, and unresolved questions;
- what Vanessa learned;
- what remains incomplete;
- the smallest safe next action;
- files the next AI must read.

Never mark unverified work complete.
